title: Alex's Caves - No Glowy Effects
description: Completely disables all "glowing" effects used by certain items/mobs within Alex's Caves. Also a slight change to holograms
body:
# Requires... [ Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves), obviously 

## Note: In order to benefit from this resource pack, make sure to disable the "radiated effect" in the configs for Alex's Caves

This is a simple resource pack that completely disables the "radiation glow" found within a couple of items/mobs from Alex's Caves, which can severely impact performance. While there does exist a config option to disable the glow for mobs under the "irradiated" effect, it does NOT affect the same glow found when using rayguns OR when encountering a Raycat.

### Changes:
- Completely disables the radiation glow effect
- Retextured Raycat, whose design heavily revolved around the glowing (check the gallery)
- disabled hologram "wobbling" effect
